title: Co-benefits and trade-offs of UK climate actions
body: "A Rapid Evidence Assessment (REA) to understand the co-benefits and trade-offs between climate mitigation and adaptation in the UK to inform the government’s efforts to promote decarbonisation and resilience.  The assessment rated the effect of a range of climate actions on UK mitigation and adaptation outcomes and determined confidence in these ratings.  "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
